notes: At the absolute right edge (3:00 PM), the red selling-pressure zone extends downward and its lower boundary terminates at approximately 6843. The two Y-axis labels bracketing this red-black boundary are 6840 and 6860. The red gradient ends roughly 15% of the way up from 6840 to 6860, yielding 6840 + 0.15 × 20 = 6843. The black void channel is roughly 5–8 pts wide (approximately 6838–6843), sitting well below the open price, indicating the equilibrium drifted significantly lower during the session. Blue buying-support pressure dominates below 6838. Channel width of ~5–8 pts and a clear red-to-black boundary give medium confidence.

At the 3 PM rightmost column, scanning top-to-bottom: red selling pressure extends from 6920 down, with its lower boundary ending approximately 50% between the 6900 and 6910 Y-axis gridlines (~6905). A narrow black equilibrium void (~5-10 pts wide) sits immediately below this red edge. Blue support pressure fills below ~6895. Bracketing labels are 6900 and 6910; red boundary fraction ~0.50; calculation: 6900 + 0.50 × 10 = 6905. Some thin red fingers extend downward at the right edge, introducing slight ambiguity in the exact red termination point.

At 3:00 PM right edge, scanning top-to-bottom: red selling pressure clearly dominates above ~6945 and fades into a dark void below. The black equilibrium channel spans roughly 6935–6945, approximately 10 pts wide. The upper boundary of the channel (where red ends and black begins) is bracketed by the 6940 and 6950 Y-axis labels, sitting about 40-45% of the way from 6940 to 6950, yielding ~6944. Blue buying support rises up to approximately 6935, confirming the channel lower boundary. Channel slopes strongly upward from ~6905 at the open to ~6940-6945 by close. Confidence is medium because the channel is ~10 pts wide and the red/blue boundary at the right edge shows some intermixing of blue patches intruding into the upper-right corner near 6948-6950.
